{"credits": [{"type": "reporter", "user": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/33688944?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/ik0z/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/ik0z/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/ik0z/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/ik0z/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/ik0z", "id": 33688944, "login": "ik0z", "node_id": "MDQ6VXNlcjMzNjg4OTQ0", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/ik0z/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/ik0z/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/ik0z/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/ik0z/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/ik0z/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/ik0z", "user_view_type": "public"}}], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-46550", "cvss": {"score": 5.4, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:N/UI:R/S:U/C:L/I:L/A:N"}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 5.4, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:N/UI:R/S:U/C:L/I:L/A:N"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-614", "name": "Sensitive Cookie in HTTPS Session Without 'Secure' Attribute"}], "description": "### Summary

The refresh-token cookie was set with `httpOnly: true` but missing both the `secure` flag and the `sameSite` attribute. Over plain HTTP the cookie could be intercepted on the network; without `sameSite`, browsers attached it to cross-site POSTs, enabling CSRF against the token-refresh endpoint.

### Details

In `packages/nocodb/src/services/users/helpers.ts`, `setTokenCookie` produced the cookie with only `httpOnly`, an `expires` date, and an optional `domain` from `NC_BASE_HOST_NAME` — no `secure`, no `sameSite`. The refresh endpoint `POST /api/v2/auth/token/refresh` (`auth.controller.ts`) read the cookie unconditionally and returned a new JWT, with no CSRF token.

The fix sets `httpOnly: true`, `sameSite: 'lax'`, and conditional `secure: req.ncSiteUrl.startsWith('https')` so the flag is active under HTTPS while still functional on plain-HTTP localhost development.

This is distinct from GHSA-x4vh-j75g-268g (refresh-token lifecycle on password reset) — different root cause, different attack vector.

### Impact

- Cookie interception on plain HTTP networks (no `secure`).
- Cross-site refresh: malicious cross-origin pages could trigger token refresh and, combined with any same-origin XSS or open-redirect on the NocoDB domain, capture the new JWT.
- Refresh tokens have multi-day expiry (`NC_REFRESH_TOKEN_EXP_IN_DAYS`), so the exposure window is long.

### Credit

This issue was reported by [@ik0z](https://github.com/ik0z).", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00099, "percentile": 0.01007}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-f74w-272x-mqcv", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-05-21T20:35:24Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-f74w-272x-mqcv", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-f74w-272x-mqcv"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-46550"}], "nvd_published_at": null, "published_at": "2026-05-21T20:35:24Z", "references": ["https://github.com/nocodb/nocodb/security/advisories/GHSA-f74w-272x-mqcv", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-f74w-272x-mqcv"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/nocodb/nocodb/security-advisories/GHSA-f74w-272x-mqcv", "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/nocodb/nocodb", "summary": "NocoDB: Refresh Token Cookie Set Without `secure` and `sameSite` Flags", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-05-21T20:35:25Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-f74w-272x-mqcv", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": null, "package": {"ecosystem": "npm", "name": "nocodb"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "<= 0.301.3"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: NocoDB: Refresh Token Cookie Set Without `secure` and `sameSite` Flags
